## 二、待实现功能详解

### 2.1 登录日志记录 (P0 - 核心功能)

#### 功能描述
记录所有登录行为，包括成功和失败的登录，用于安全审计和问题追溯。

#### 实现要点

```java
/**
 * 登录日志实体类
 */
@Data
@TableName("sys_login_log")
public class SysLoginLog implements Serializable {
    @TableId(type = IdType.AUTO)
    private Long id;
    private Long userId;
    private String username;
    private String ipaddr;
    private String ipLocation;  // IP归属地
    private String browser;
    private String os;
    private String device;
    private String deviceId;
    private Integer status;      // 0失败 1成功
    private String msg;
    private LocalDateTime loginTime;
    private LocalDateTime logoutTime;
    private String sessionId;
    private String token;
    private Integer riskScore;
    private String riskTags;
    private LocalDateTime createTime;
}

/**
 * 登录日志服务
 */
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class LoginLogService {

    private final SysLoginLogMapper loginLogMapper;

    /**
     * 记录登录成功
     */
    public void recordLoginSuccess(Long userId, String username,
                                   String ip, String deviceInfo,
                                   HttpServletRequest request) {
        SysLoginLog log = new SysLoginLog();
        log.setUserId(userId);
        log.setUsername(username);
        log.setIpaddr(ip);
        log.setIpLocation(IpUtil.getIpLocation(ip));  // IP归属地
        log.setBrowser(UserAgentUtil.getBrowser(request));
        log.setOs(UserAgentUtil.getOs(request));
        log.setDevice(deviceInfo);
        log.setDeviceId(request.getParameter("deviceId"));
        log.setStatus(1);
        log.setMsg("登录成功");
        log.setLoginTime(LocalDateTime.now());
        log.setSessionId(request.getSession().getId());
        loginLogMapper.insert(log);
    }

    /**
     * 记录登录失败
     */
    public void recordLoginFailure(String username, String ip,
                                   String errorMsg) {
        SysLoginLog log = new SysLoginLog();
        log.setUsername(username);
        log.setIpaddr(ip);
        log.setIpLocation(IpUtil.getIpLocation(ip));
        log.setStatus(0);
        log.setMsg(errorMsg);
        log.setLoginTime(LocalDateTime.now());
        loginLogMapper.insert(log);
    }

    /**
     * 记录登出
     */
    public void recordLogout(Long userId) {
        loginLogMapper.update(null,
            new LambdaUpdateWrapper<SysLoginLog>()
                .eq(SysLoginLog::getUserId, userId)
                .isNull(SysLoginLog::getLogoutTime)
                .set(SysLoginLog::getLogoutTime, LocalDateTime.now())
        );
    }

    /**
     * 查询登录历史
     */
    public PageResult<SysLoginLog> getLoginHistory(Long userId, int page, int size) {
        Page<SysLoginLog> pageParam = new Page<>(page, size);
        LambdaQueryWrapper<SysLoginLog> wrapper = new LambdaQueryWrapper<>()
            .eq(SysLoginLog::getUserId, userId)
            .orderByDesc(SysLoginLog::getLoginTime);
        Page<SysLoginLog> result = loginLogMapper.selectPage(pageParam, wrapper);
        return PageResult.of(result);
    }
}
```

#### 修改登录流程

```java
// 在AuthService.login()方法中添加

// 登录成功
if (success) {
    // ... 生成Token、保存会话 ...

    // 记录登录日志
    loginLogService.recordLoginSuccess(
        user.getId(),
        user.getUsername(),
        ip,
        request.getDeviceType(),
        httpRequest
    );
}

// 登录失败
if (fail) {
    // 记录登录失败
    loginLogService.recordLoginFailure(username, ip, errorMsg);
}

// 登出
@Override
public void logout(Long userId) {
    sessionService.deleteSession(userId);
    loginLogService.recordLogout(userId);
}
```

### 2.2 Token黑名单 (P0 - 核心功能)

#### 功能描述
将已登出、被踢出、修改密码等情况下的Token加入黑名单，防止继续使用。

#### 实现要点

```java
/**
 * Token黑名单服务
 */
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class TokenBlacklistService {

    private final StringRedisTemplate redisTemplate;
    private final JwtUtil jwtUtil;

    private static final String BLACKLIST_PREFIX = "blacklist:token:";

    /**
     * 加入黑名单
     */
    public void addToBlacklist(String token, Long userId, String reason) {
        // 获取Token过期时间
        Date expiration = jwtUtil.getExpiration(token);
        long ttl = expiration.getTime() - System.currentTimeMillis();

        if (ttl > 0) {
            // 只加入未过期的Token
            String key = BLACKLIST_PREFIX + token;
            redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(key, "1", ttl, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);
        }
    }

    /**
     * 检查是否在黑名单
     */
    public boolean isBlacklisted(String token) {
        String key = BLACKLIST_PREFIX + token;
        return Boolean.TRUE.equals(redisTemplate.hasKey(key));
    }

    /**
     * 批量加入黑名单 (强制下线用户所有Token)
     */
    public void blacklistAllUserTokens(Long userId, String reason) {
        // 查询Redis中用户的所有会话
        String pattern = "auth:session:" + userId;
        Set<String> keys = redisTemplate.keys(pattern);
        if (keys != null && !keys.isEmpty()) {
            // 从会话中提取Token并加入黑名单
            // (需要存储Token到会话中)
        }
    }
}
```

#### 修改拦截器

```java
@Override
public boolean preHandle(HttpServletRequest request,
                         HttpServletResponse response,
                         Object handler) throws Exception {
    // ... 前面的验证 ...

    // 检查Token是否在黑名单
    if (tokenBlacklistService.isBlacklisted(token)) {
        response401(response, "Token已失效，请重新登录");
        return false;
    }

    return true;
}
```

### 2.3 在线用户管理 (P1 - 重要功能)

#### 功能描述
查看当前在线的所有用户，支持强制下线操作。

#### 实现要点

```java
/**
 * 在线用户服务
 */
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class OnlineUserService {

    private final StringRedisTemplate redisTemplate;
    private final JwtUtil jwtUtil;

    private static final String SESSION_PREFIX = "auth:session:";

    /**
     * 获取在线用户列表
     */
    public List<OnlineUser> getOnlineUsers() {
        // 查询所有会话Key
        Set<String> keys = redisTemplate.keys(SESSION_PREFIX + "*");
        if (keys == null || keys.isEmpty()) {
            return Collections.emptyList();
        }

        List<OnlineUser> onlineUsers = new ArrayList<>();
        for (String key : keys) {
            // 从Hash中获取会话信息
            Map<Object, Object> session = redisTemplate.opsForHash().entries(key);

            OnlineUser user = new OnlineUser();
            user.setUserId(Long.valueOf(session.get("userId").toString()));
            user.setUsername(session.get("username").toString());
            user.setNickname(session.get("nickname").toString());
            user.setLoginTime(Long.parseLong(session.get("loginTime").toString()));
            user.setIp(session.get("ip").toString());
            user.setDeviceId(session.get("deviceId").toString());

            onlineUsers.add(user);
        }

        return onlineUsers;
    }

    /**
     * 强制下线
     */
    public void forceLogout(Long userId) {
        // 删除会话
        redisTemplate.delete(SESSION_PREFIX + userId);
        redisTemplate.delete("auth:refresh:" + userId);

        // 删除所有设备会话
        Set<String> deviceKeys = redisTemplate.keys("auth:device:" + userId + ":*");
        if (deviceKeys != null && !deviceKeys.isEmpty()) {
            redisTemplate.delete(deviceKeys);
        }
    }

    /**
     * 获取在线用户数量
     */
    public Long getOnlineCount() {
        Set<String> keys = redisTemplate.keys(SESSION_PREFIX + "*");
        return keys == null ? 0L : (long) keys.size();
    }
}

/**
 * 在线用户DTO
 */
@Data
public class OnlineUser {
    private Long userId;
    private String username;
    private String nickname;
    private Long loginTime;
    private String ip;
    private String ipLocation;
    private String deviceId;
    private String browser;
    private String os;
}
```

#### 控制器

```java
/**
 * 在线用户管理控制器
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/admin/online")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class OnlineUserController {

    private final OnlineUserService onlineUserService;

    /**
     * 获取在线用户列表
     */
    @GetMapping("/list")
    public Result<List<OnlineUser>> getOnlineUsers() {
        return Result.success(onlineUserService.getOnlineUsers());
    }

    /**
     * 获取在线用户数量
     */
    @GetMapping("/count")
    public Result<Long> getOnlineCount() {
        return Result.success(onlineUserService.getOnlineCount());
    }

    /**
     * 强制下线
     */
    @PostMapping("/forceLogout/{userId}")
    public Result<Void> forceLogout(@PathVariable Long userId) {
        onlineUserService.forceLogout(userId);
        return Result.success("强制下线成功");
    }
}
```

### 2.4 验证码功能 (P1 - 重要功能)

#### 功能描述
登录时使用图形验证码，防止机器人批量登录。

#### 实现要点

```java
/**
 * 验证码配置
 */
@Configuration
public class CaptchaConfig {

    @Bean
    public DefaultKaptcha defaultKaptcha() {
        DefaultKaptcha kaptcha = new DefaultKaptcha();
        Properties properties = new Properties();
        properties.setProperty(Constants.KAPTCHA_BORDER, "no");
        properties.setProperty(Constants.KAPTCHA_TEXTPRODUCER_FONT_COLOR, "blue");
        properties.setProperty(Constants.KAPTCHA_TEXTPRODUCER_FONT_SIZE, "40");
        properties.setProperty(Constants.KAPTCHA_SESSION_KEY, "code");
        properties.setProperty(Constants.KAPTCHA_TEXTPRODUCER_CHAR_LENGTH, "4");
        properties.setProperty(Constants.KAPTCHA_IMAGE_WIDTH, "120");
        properties.setProperty(Constants.KAPTCHA_IMAGE_HEIGHT, "40");
        Config config = new Config(properties);
        kaptcha.setConfig(config);
        return kaptcha;
    }
}

/**
 * 验证码服务
 */
@Service
public class CaptchaService {

    @Autowired
    private DefaultKaptcha defaultKaptcha;

    @Autowired
    private StringRedisTemplate redisTemplate;

    private static final String CAPTCHA_PREFIX = "captcha:";
    private static final int CAPTCHA_EXPIRE_TIME = 300; // 5分钟

    /**
     * 生成验证码
     */
    public CaptchaVO generateCaptcha() {
        // 生成验证码
        String captchaText = defaultKaptcha.createText();

        // 生成图片
        BufferedImage captchaImage = defaultKaptcha.createImage(captchaText);

        // 生成唯一Key
        String captchaKey = UUID.randomUUID().toString();

        // 存储到Redis
        redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(
            CAPTCHA_PREFIX + captchaKey,
            captchaText,
            CAPTCHA_EXPIRE_TIME,
            TimeUnit.SECONDS
        );

        // 转换为Base64
        ByteArrayOutputStream outputStream = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
        try {
            ImageIO.write(captchaImage, "jpg", outputStream);
        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException("生成验证码失败", e);
        }
        String base64Image = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(outputStream.toByteArray());

        CaptchaVO captchaVO = new CaptchaVO();
        captchaVO.setCaptchaKey(captchaKey);
        captchaVO.setCaptchaImage("data:image/jpeg;base64," + base64Image);

        return captchaVO;
    }

    /**
     * 验证验证码
     */
    public boolean verifyCaptcha(String captchaKey, String captchaText) {
        String storedCaptcha = redisTemplate.opsForValue().get(CAPTCHA_PREFIX + captchaKey);

        if (storedCaptcha == null) {
            return false;
        }

        // 验证后删除
        redisTemplate.delete(CAPTCHA_PREFIX + captchaKey);

        // 忽略大小写
        return storedCaptcha.equalsIgnoreCase(captchaText);
    }
}

/**
 * 验证码VO
 */
@Data
public class CaptchaVO {
    private String captchaKey;
    private String captchaImage;
}

/**
 * 验证码控制器
 */
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/captcha")
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class CaptchaController {

    private final CaptchaService captchaService;

    /**
     * 获取验证码
     */
    @GetMapping("/image")
    public Result<CaptchaVO> getCaptcha() {
        CaptchaVO captcha = captchaService.generateCaptcha();
        return Result.success(captcha);
    }
}
```

#### 修改登录接口

```java
@PostMapping("/login")
public Result<LoginResponse> login(@Valid @RequestBody LoginRequest request,
                                  HttpServletRequest httpRequest) {
    // 验证码校验
    if (StrUtil.isNotBlank(request.getCaptchaKey())) {
        if (!captchaService.verifyCaptcha(request.getCaptchaKey(), request.getCaptcha())) {
            return Result.error("验证码错误");
        }
    }

    // ... 原有登录逻辑 ...
}
```

### 2.5 设备管理 (P2 - 次要功能)

#### 功能描述
管理用户登录过的设备，支持移除设备、设置可信设备等功能。

#### 实现要点

```java
/**
 * 设备服务
 */
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class DeviceService {

    private final SysUserDeviceMapper deviceMapper;

    /**
     * 保存登录设备
     */
    public void saveLoginDevice(Long userId, String deviceId,
                                HttpServletRequest request) {
        // 检查设备是否已存在
        SysUserDevice existingDevice = deviceMapper.selectOne(
            new LambdaQueryWrapper<SysUserDevice>()
                .eq(SysUserDevice::getUserId, userId)
                .eq(SysUserDevice::getDeviceId, deviceId)
        );

        if (existingDevice != null) {
            // 更新最后登录时间和登录次数
            existingDevice.setLastLoginTime(LocalDateTime.now());
            existingDevice.setLoginCount(existingDevice.getLoginCount() + 1);
            deviceMapper.updateById(existingDevice);
        } else {
            // 新增设备
            SysUserDevice device = new SysUserDevice();
            device.setUserId(userId);
            device.setDeviceId(deviceId);
            device.setBrowser(UserAgentUtil.getBrowser(request));
            device.setOs(UserAgentUtil.getOs(request));
            device.setIpaddr(IpUtil.getIpAddr(request));
            device.setIpLocation(IpUtil.getIpLocation(IpUtil.getIpAddr(request)));
            device.setLastLoginTime(LocalDateTime.now());
            device.setLoginCount(1);
            deviceMapper.insert(device);
        }
    }

    /**
     * 获取用户设备列表
     */
    public List<SysUserDevice> getUserDevices(Long userId) {
        return deviceMapper.selectList(
            new LambdaQueryWrapper<SysUserDevice>()
                .eq(SysUserDevice::getUserId, userId)
                .orderByDesc(SysUserDevice::getLastLoginTime)
        );
    }

    /**
     * 移除设备
     */
    public void removeDevice(Long userId, String deviceId) {
        deviceMapper.delete(
            new LambdaQueryWrapper<SysUserDevice>()
                .eq(SysUserDevice::getUserId, userId)
                .eq(SysUserDevice::getDeviceId, deviceId)
        );
    }

    /**
     * 设置可信设备
     */
    public void setTrustedDevice(Long userId, String deviceId) {
        deviceMapper.update(null,
            new LambdaUpdateWrapper<SysUserDevice>()
                .eq(SysUserDevice::getUserId, userId)
                .eq(SysUserDevice::getDeviceId, deviceId)
                .set(SysUserDevice::getIsTrusted, 1)
                .set(SysUserDevice::getTrustTime, LocalDateTime.now())
        );
    }
}
```

---

### 2.6 风控系统 (P2 - 次要功能)

#### 功能描述
检测异常登录行为，包括异地登录、异常设备、高频登录等。

#### 实现要点

```java
/**
 * 风控服务
 */
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class RiskControlService {

    private final SysUserMapper userMapper;
    private final LoginLogService loginLogService;

    /**
     * 风险评分
     */
    public RiskScore assessRisk(Long userId, String ip, String deviceId) {
        RiskScore score = new RiskScore();
        int totalScore = 0;
        List<String> tags = new ArrayList<>();

        // 1. 查询历史登录记录
        List<SysLoginLog> history = loginLogService.getRecentLogins(userId, 10);

        // 2. 异地登录检测
        if (isAbnormalLocation(history, ip)) {
            totalScore += 30;
            tags.add("异地登录");
        }

        // 3. 异常设备检测
        if (isAbnormalDevice(history, deviceId)) {
            totalScore += 20;
            tags.add("异常设备");
        }

        // 4. 高频登录检测
        if (isHighFrequencyLogin(userId)) {
            totalScore += 20;
            tags.add("高频登录");
        }

        // 5. IP风险检测
        if (isRiskIp(ip)) {
            totalScore += 30;
            tags.add("风险IP");
        }

        score.setScore(totalScore);
        score.setTags(tags);

        // 根据分数返回风控动作
        if (totalScore < 30) {
            score.setAction("PASS");
        } else if (totalScore < 60) {
            score.setAction("CAPTCHA");  // 需要验证码
        } else if (totalScore < 80) {
            score.setAction("REVIEW");  // 需要人工审核
        } else {
            score.setAction("BLOCK");   // 直接拦截
        }

        return score;
    }

    /**
     * 异地登录检测
     */
    private boolean isAbnormalLocation(List<SysLoginLog> history, String currentIp) {
        if (history.isEmpty()) {
            return false;
        }

        String lastCity = IpUtil.getCity(history.get(0).getIpaddr());
        String currentCity = IpUtil.getCity(currentIp);

        return !lastCity.equals(currentCity);
    }

    /**
     * 异常设备检测
     */
    private boolean isAbnormalDevice(List<SysLoginLog> history, String currentDevice) {
        return history.stream()
            .noneMatch(log -> currentDevice.equals(log.getDeviceId()));
    }

    /**
     * 高频登录检测
     */
    private boolean isHighFrequencyLogin(Long userId) {
        // 10分钟内登录超过5次
        LocalDateTime tenMinutesAgo = LocalDateTime.now().minusMinutes(10);
        long count = loginLogService.countRecentLogins(userId, tenMinutesAgo);
        return count > 5;
    }

    /**
     * IP风险检测
     */
    private boolean isRiskIp(String ip) {
        // 检查IP是否在黑名单
        // 检查IP是否为数据中心IP
        // 检查IP是否为代理IP
        return false;
    }
}

/**
 * 风险评分结果
 */
@Data
public class RiskScore {
    private int score;        // 0-100
    private List<String> tags;
    private String action;    // PASS/CAPTCHA/REVIEW/BLOCK
}
```

### 2.7 数据权限控制 (P2 - 次要功能)

#### 功能描述
根据角色的数据范围配置，限制用户可访问的数据。

#### 实现要点

```java
/**
 * 数据权限注解
 */
@Target(ElementType.METHOD)
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
public @interface DataScope {
    /**
     * 部门表别名
     */
    String alias() default "d";

    /**
     * 用户表别名
     */
    String userAlias() default "u";
}

/**
 * 数据权限切面
 */
@Aspect
@Component
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class DataScopeAspect {

    private final SysRoleMapper roleMapper;
    private final SysDeptMapper deptMapper;

    @Before("@annotation(dataScope)")
    public void doBefore(JoinPoint point, DataScope dataScope) {
        // 获取当前用户ID
        Long userId = SecurityUtils.getUserId();

        // 查询用户角色
        List<SysRole> roles = roleMapper.selectRolesByUserId(userId);

        // 检查是否有数据范围限制
        for (SysRole role : roles) {
            if (role.getDataScope() != null) {
                String deptIds = buildDeptIds(role, userId);
                // 将deptIds放到ThreadLocal或参数中
                DataScopeContext.setDeptIds(deptIds);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 构建部门ID列表
     */
    private String buildDeptIds(SysRole role, Long userId) {
        switch (role.getDataScope()) {
            case 1: // 全部数据
                return null;

            case 2: // 自定义数据
                return role.getDataScopeDepts();

            case 3: // 本部门数据
                return String.valueOf(getUserDeptId(userId));

            case 4: // 本部门及以下数据
                return getDeptAndChildrenIds(getUserDeptId(userId));

            case 5: // 仅本人数据
                return "user_" + userId;

            default:
                return null;
        }
    }

    @After("@annotation(dataScope)")
    public void doAfter(JoinPoint point, DataScope dataScope) {
        DataScopeContext.clear();
    }
}

/**
 * 使用示例
 */
@Override
public List<SysUser> getUserList() {
    return userMapper.selectList(
        new LambdaQueryWrapper<SysUser>()
            // 如果有数据权限，会自动添加条件
            .apply(DataScopeContext.hasDataScope(),
                "dept_id IN ({0})", DataScopeContext.getDeptIds())
    );
}
```

---

### 2.8 菜单树构建 (P0 - 核心功能)

#### 功能描述
将扁平的菜单列表转换为树形结构，供前端渲染。

#### 实现要点

```java
/**
 * 菜单服务 (补充)
 */
@Service
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class MenuService {

    private final SysMenuMapper menuMapper;

    /**
     * 构建菜单树
     */
    public List<MenuTree> buildMenuTree(List<SysMenu> menus) {
        List<MenuTree> tree = new ArrayList<>();

        // 找出所有顶级菜单 (parent_id = 0)
        List<SysMenu> topMenus = menus.stream()
            .filter(m -> m.getParentId() == 0L)
            .collect(Collectors.toList());

        // 递归构建子菜单
        for (SysMenu topMenu : topMenus) {
            MenuTree treeNode = buildTreeNode(menus, topMenu);
            tree.add(treeNode);
        }

        return tree;
    }

    /**
     * 递归构建树节点
     */
    private MenuTree buildTreeNode(List<SysMenu> allMenus, SysMenu menu) {
        MenuTree node = new MenuTree();
        node.setId(menu.getId());
        node.setParentId(menu.getParentId());
        node.setMenuName(menu.getMenuName());
        node.setMenuKey(menu.getMenuKey());
        node.setPath(menu.getPath());
        node.setComponent(menu.getComponent());
        node.setIcon(menu.getIcon());
        node.setMenuType(menu.getMenuType());
        node.setPerms(menu.getPerms());
        node.setSort(menu.getSort());

        // 查找子菜单
        List<SysMenu> children = allMenus.stream()
            .filter(m -> m.getParentId().equals(menu.getId()))
            .sorted(Comparator.comparing(SysMenu::getSort))
            .collect(Collectors.toList());

        // 递归构建子节点
        List<MenuTree> childNodes = new ArrayList<>();
        for (SysMenu child : children) {
            MenuTree childNode = buildTreeNode(allMenus, child);
            childNodes.add(childNode);
        }
        node.setChildren(childNodes);

        return node;
    }
}
```

## 四、代码质量优化

### 4.1 异常处理优化

```java
/**
 * 全局异常处理器
 */
@RestControllerAdvice
public class GlobalExceptionHandler {

    /**
     * 业务异常
     */
    @ExceptionHandler(BusinessException.class)
    public Result<Void> handleBusinessException(BusinessException e) {
        return Result.error(e.getCode(), e.getMessage());
    }

    /**
     * 参数校验异常
     */
    @ExceptionHandler(MethodArgumentNotValidException.class)
    public Result<Void> handleValidationException(MethodArgumentNotValidException e) {
        String message = e.getBindingResult().getFieldErrors().stream()
            .map(FieldError::getDefaultMessage)
            .collect(Collectors.joining(", "));
        return Result.error(400, message);
    }

    /**
     * 认证异常
     */
    @ExceptionHandler(AuthenticationException.class)
    public Result<Void> handleAuthenticationException(AuthenticationException e) {
        return Result.error(401, e.getMessage());
    }

    /**
     * 权限异常
     */
    @ExceptionHandler(AccessDeniedException.class)
    public Result<Void> handleAccessDeniedException(AccessDeniedException e) {
        return Result.error(403, "权限不足");
    }

    /**
     * 系统异常
     */
    @ExceptionHandler(Exception.class)
    public Result<Void> handleException(Exception e) {
        log.error("系统异常", e);
        return Result.error(500, "系统错误，请联系管理员");
    }
}

/**
 * 业务异常
 */
public class BusinessException extends RuntimeException {
    private int code;

    public BusinessException(String message) {
        super(message);
        this.code = 500;
    }

    public BusinessException(int code, String message) {
        super(message);
        this.code = code;
    }

    public int getCode() {
        return code;
    }
}
```

### 4.2 参数校验增强

```java
/**
 * 自定义校验注解
 */
@Target({ElementType.FIELD})
@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)
@Constraint(validatedBy = PasswordValidator.class)
public @interface ValidPassword {
    String message() default "密码格式不正确";
    Class<?>[] groups() default {};
    Class<? extends Payload>[] payload() default {};
}

/**
 * 密码校验器
 */
public class PasswordValidator implements ConstraintValidator<ValidPassword, String> {

    @Override
    public boolean isValid(String value, ConstraintValidatorContext context) {
        if (value == null) {
            return true;  // 由@NotBlank控制
        }

        // 密码长度 6-20
        if (value.length() < 6 || value.length() > 20) {
            return false;
        }

        // 必须包含字母和数字
        boolean hasLetter = value.matches(".*[a-zA-Z].*");
        boolean hasDigit = value.matches(".*\\d.*");

        return hasLetter && hasDigit;
    }
}

/**
 * 使用示例
 */
@Data
public class LoginRequest {
    @NotBlank(message = "用户名不能为空")
    private String username;

    @NotBlank(message = "密码不能为空")
    @ValidPassword
    private String password;
}
```

## 五、测试计划

### 5.1 单元测试

```java
@SpringBootTest
class JwtUtilTest {

    @Autowired
    private JwtUtil jwtUtil;

    @Test
    void testGenerateAndVerifyToken() {
        String token = jwtUtil.generateAccessToken(1L, "admin",
            new String[]{"admin"}, new String[]{"*"});

        assertTrue(jwtUtil.verifyToken(token));
        assertEquals(1L, jwtUtil.getUserId(token));
        assertEquals("admin", jwtUtil.getUsername(token));
    }

    @Test
    void testExpiredToken() {
        // 测试过期Token
    }
}
```

### 5.2 接口测试

```java
@SpringBootTest(webEnvironment = WebEnvironment.RANDOM_PORT)
@AutoConfigureMockMvc
class AuthControllerTest {

    @Autowired
    private MockMvc mockMvc;

    @Test
    void testLogin() throws Exception {
        String json = """
            {
                "username": "admin",
                "password": "123456"
            }
            """;

        mockMvc.perform(post("/api/auth/login")
                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
                .content(json))
            .andExpect(status().isOk())
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.code").value(200))
            .andExpect(jsonPath("$.data.accessToken").isNotEmpty());
    }
}
```

### 6.2 建议

1. **优先实现P0功能**，完成核心业务闭环
2. **按阶段实施**，每个阶段完成后进行测试
3. **代码质量优先**，完善异常处理和参数校验
4. **编写单元测试**，保证代码质量
5. **文档同步更新**，记录实现细节
